allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; c=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('host:', c.get\('host'\)\); print\('username:', c.get\('username'\)\); print\('base_url:', c.get\('remote_anthropic_base_url'\)\); k=c.get\('remote_anthropic_api_key',''\); print\('api_key set?:', bool\(k\) and not k.startswith\('sk-LANYI-asg-REPLACE'\)\); print\('api_key \(masked\):', k[:7]+'***'+k[-4:] if k else ''\)")
Bash(python -c "import anthropic; print\('anthropic SDK installed, version:', anthropic.__version__\)")
Bash(python -c "import os; [print\(k,'set' if os.environ.get\(k\) else 'NOT set'\) for k in ['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY','ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN','ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL']]")

Bash(python -c "import json; c=json.load\(open\('asg/vm_config.json'\)\); print\('JSON OK'\); print\('base_url:', c['remote_anthropic_base_url']\); k=c['remote_anthropic_api_key']; print\('api_key:', 'PLACEHOLDER \(you need to fill\)' if 'REPLACE' in k else 'SET'\)")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; Write-Output "Killed PID $_" } } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 8765" })
